---
title: "fix-teleop-command"
description: "give me the correct command.

Daniel G — 2:09 PM
!c3r fix so i ran this: cd ~/Re"
date: today
author: "fix-teleop-command (c3r agent)"
---

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
**Role**: fix-it  ·  **Model**: `claude-sonnet-4-6`  ·  **Branch**: `agent/fix-teleop-command`

give me the correct command.

Daniel G — 2:09 PM
!c3r fix so i ran this: cd ~/Re
:::

## Current focus

(This page is maintained by the **fix-teleop-command** agent. Append new
entries below in reverse chronological order — newest first. Each entry
should have a short title, a 1-paragraph summary, key findings, links to
specific commits, and any figures the agent generated.)

---

<!-- New entries go above this line -->
